articles.title: Vertica Analytics Assistant: Natural Language SQL with RAG
articles.excerpt: Production system converting natural language queries to Vertica SQL using retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Covers architecture, LLM model selection trade-offs, production challenges (latency/accuracy), and solutions. Includes both Streamlit UI and CLI automation tool.

articles.title: Automating CVE Risk Assessment: From Advisory to Protected Devices
articles.excerpt: Production system for intelligent vulnerability management. Automatically parse vendor CVE advisories, match to device inventory, reason through exploitability using LLM agents, and generate VEX-compliant risk assessments with audit trails.

articles.title: Why Fixed Top-K Retrieval Is Secretly Hurting Your RAG System
articles.excerpt: Why fixed K wastes tokens, adaptive K strategies with code examples, performance benchmarks, and hybrid confidence+token-budget approach.
